projects.name: Disha Azure Heights
projects.tagline: Sky homes above the city of tomorrow
projects.description: A landmark of 3 & 4 BHK sky residences rising 38 storeys above the Financial District. Disha Azure Heights pairs floor-to-ceiling glass with a 60,000 sq.ft sky clubhouse, redefining vertical luxury in West Hyderabad.
highlights: 38-storey twin towers with private sky lounges
EV charging on every parking level

faqs.q: What is the RERA registration number?
faqs.a: Disha Azure Heights is RERA registered under P02400001234, with all approvals available for verification at our experience centre.
Possession is scheduled for December 2027. Construction is currently 42% complete and tracking on schedule.
Yes. We have project-level approvals with SBI, HDFC, and ICICI, enabling faster sanctions for eligible buyers and NRIs.

projects.name: Disha Emerald Villas
projects.tagline: Forty private estates around a living forest
projects.description: Forty triple-height villas arranged around a two-acre native forest courtyard. Each Emerald estate offers a private plunge pool, double-height living, and a rooftop sky deck — a rare expression of horizontal luxury on Sarjapur Road.
highlights: Private plunge pool with every villa
Rooftop sky deck and outdoor kitchen

faqs.q: Is this a gated villa community?
faqs.a: Yes, all forty villas sit within a single gated estate with 24/7 manned security and perimeter surveillance.
Buyers booking before launch can select from three curated interior palettes and request bespoke modifications during construction.
Built-up area is intentionally kept under 45% to preserve private gardens and the central forest.

projects.name: Disha Signature Square
projects.tagline: The address that signs the skyline
projects.description: A LEED Platinum Grade-A office tower and high-street retail destination in the heart of HITEC City. Signature Square delivers 1.2 million sq.ft of leasable space with a triple-height lobby and column-free floor plates for global occupiers.
highlights: 1.2 million sq.ft LEED Platinum Grade-A space

faqs.a: Signature Square is over 90% leased to multinational technology and consulting occupiers, with limited retail units available for purchase.
The tower is LEED Platinum certified with rainwater harvesting, greywater recycling, and a rooftop solar array.

faqs.q: Are units available for outright purchase?
faqs.a: Select retail units and one office floor are available for purchase. Office leasing is managed by our commercial desk.

projects.name: Disha Grand Meadows
projects.tagline: Plotted estates beside the new airport corridor
projects.description: A 60-acre plotted development of premium villa plots minutes from Kempegowda International Airport. Grand Meadows offers fully-loaded plots with tree-lined avenues, underground utilities, and a grand clubhouse for the next generation of homebuilders.

faqs.a: Yes, all plots are DTCP and RERA approved with clear, single-owner title and ready conveyance documentation.

faqs.q: Can I build immediately after purchase?
faqs.a: Phase 1 plots are registry-ready with all utilities in place, so you may begin construction on possession.

faqs.q: Is bank financing available for plots?
faqs.a: Plot-plus-construction loans are available through our partner banks for eligible buyers.

projects.name: Disha Riverfront Residences
projects.tagline: Waterfront living on the Outer Ring Road
projects.description: 2 & 3 BHK residences overlooking a restored waterbody on the ORR growth corridor. Riverfront Residences brings resort-style amenities and a kilometre-long promenade to one of Hyderabad's fastest-appreciating micro-markets.

faqs.q: How far is the ORR exit?
faqs.a: The project has direct access to the Kollur ORR exit, placing the Financial District within a 20-minute drive.
Yes, expression-of-interest bookings unlock pre-launch pricing and priority unit selection.
The development is a balanced mix of compact 2 BHK and spacious 3 BHK homes across six towers.

projects.name: Disha Crown Residences
projects.tagline: An heirloom address in old Hyderabad
projects.description: An ultra-luxury boutique tower of just 48 residences in the city's most coveted neighbourhood. Crown Residences offers full-floor and duplex homes with private elevators, delivered and fully occupied — a benchmark for legacy living.

faqs.a: Crown Residences is sold out. Occasional resale opportunities are handled by our private client desk.
Banjara Hills remains Hyderabad's most established luxury enclave, ensuring strong value retention and exclusivity.

faqs.q: Is there a private client programme?
faqs.a: Yes, our private client desk assists existing owners with resale, leasing, and concierge services.

testimonials.name: Ramesh & Lakshmi Iyer
testimonials.quote: From the first site visit to handover, Disha treated us like family. The build quality genuinely exceeds what was promised in the brochure.

testimonials.name: Sandeep Reddy
testimonials.quote: Investing from overseas felt effortless. Transparent paperwork, regular construction videos, and a returns story that has held up beautifully.

testimonials.name: Dr. Anjali Menon
testimonials.quote: The forest courtyard is the soul of our home. Disha understood that luxury is about how a space makes you feel, not just what it costs.

testimonials.name: Vikram Saxena
testimonials.quote: Our headquarters has never looked better. Grade-A specification, on-time delivery, and a leasing team that actually delivers tenants.

testimonials.name: Priya & Karthik
testimonials.quote: We were nervous first-time buyers. The team walked us through RERA, loans, and Vaastu with real patience. Trust earned.

news.title: Disha Riverfront Residences opens for expression of interest
news.excerpt: Pre-launch bookings open for our waterfront community on the ORR corridor, with priority unit selection for early registrants.

news.title: Disha Signature wins Developer of the Year — South India
news.excerpt: Recognised at the Realty Excellence Awards 2026 for design innovation and on-time delivery across our residential portfolio.

news.title: Azure Heights tops out Tower A structure
news.excerpt: Tower A reaches its 38th-floor structural milestone, keeping the project firmly on its December 2027 possession timeline.

news.title: Signature Square achieves LEED Platinum certification
news.excerpt: Our flagship commercial tower earns the highest green-building rating for energy, water, and indoor environment performance.

leadership.name: Arvind Disha
leadership.bio: Three decades in real estate. Arvind founded Disha Signature on a single conviction: that a builder's name should be a guarantee, not a gamble.

leadership.name: Meera Disha
leadership.bio: An architect by training, Meera leads design and delivery, ensuring every Disha address carries the same signature of craft.

leadership.name: Rohan Kulkarni
leadership.bio: Rohan brings precision to execution, overseeing construction, procurement, and the on-time delivery our owners count on.

leadership.name: Sneha Varma
leadership.bio: Sneha shapes how Disha tells its story, building a brand that home buyers, NRIs, and institutions trust across markets.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.text: Every commitment in writing, every promise kept. Our word is the foundation we build on.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.text: Obsessive attention to material, finish, and detail — the difference you feel, not just see.

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.text: RERA-first disclosure, honest pricing, and construction updates you never have to ask for.

coreValues.title: Stewardship
coreValues.text: Green-rated developments and restored landscapes that give more to the city than they take.

awards.title: Developer of the Year — South India

company.name: DISHA SIGNATURE
company.address: Disha Signature Tower, Road No. 12, Banjara Hills, Hyderabad 500034
